title: Why Straws Look Bent in Water
script_summary: Explore the science behind why straws appear bent in water through the phenomenon of refraction.

segments.voiceover: Ever wondered why straws look bent in water?
Light travels at different speeds in air versus water.
This change in speed causes bending, known as refraction.
So that quirky bend? Totally explainable!
Curious about more science secrets? Follow for more!

full_voiceover: Ever wondered why straws look bent in water? It's not magic; it's physics! Light travels at different speeds in air versus water. This change in speed causes bending, known as refraction. So that quirky bend? Totally explainable! Curious about more science secrets? Follow for more!
